value:
Thank you for reaching out with your privacy concerns. I understand you're looking to opt out of Nielsen measurement in our app and have questions about how that's legally permissible.

To help you with the opt-out process, I'll need a bit more information: which app are you using, and what device type (iOS or Android)? Nielsen measurement practices are typically governed by privacy laws and user consent frameworks that vary by region, and the specific opt-out steps depend on your platform.

Once you provide those details, I can walk you through exactly how to disable Nielsen tracking in your settings. In the meantime, if you have broader questions about our data practices and legal basis for measurement, I'm happy to point you toward our privacy policy or connect you with our privacy team if needed.
